results.rendered_html:
asamavāyin a. Not intimate or inherent, accidental, separable.
Comp.
— kāraṇaṃ (In logic) an accidental cause, not inherent and intimate relation; guṇakarmamātravṛttijñeyamathāpyasamavāyihetutvaṃ  Bhāṣā P. ; yathā taṃtuyogaḥ paṭasya.
